Senior Software Engineer - We are looking for an experienced engineer to join our platform team. Requirements: 5+ years experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js. Experience with PostgreSQL and Redis. Strong understanding of distributed systems.

Product Manager - Lead product strategy for our B2B SaaS platform. You will work closely with engineering, design, and sales teams. Requirements: 3+ years PM experience, data-driven decision making, excellent communication skills.

Machine Learning Engineer - Join our AI team to build and deploy production ML models. Requirements: PhD or MS in CS/ML, experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow, knowledge of transformer architectures, experience with MLOps pipelines.

DevOps Engineer - Manage and scale our cloud infrastructure on AWS. Responsibilities include CI/CD pipeline management, infrastructure as code with Terraform, monitoring with Prometheus and Grafana, and incident response.

AI Safety Engineer - Research and implement prompt injection defenses for our LLM-powered products. You will design adversarial testing frameworks and build guardrails for production AI systems. Must have experience with red-teaming.

Frontend Developer - Build beautiful, accessible user interfaces with React and TypeScript. We use a system design approach with shared component libraries. Experience with CSS-in-JS, testing with Playwright, and state management required.

Data Analyst - Transform raw data into actionable business insights. Requirements: SQL proficiency, experience with Python or R, data visualization with Tableau or Looker, strong storytelling skills with data.

Security Engineer - Protect our systems and customer data. Conduct penetration testing, vulnerability assessments, and security code reviews. Experience with OWASP Top 10, SOC 2 compliance, and incident response required.

Technical Program Manager - Drive cross-functional engineering programs from inception to delivery. Coordinate between 5+ engineering teams, manage dependencies, and ensure on-time delivery of quarterly milestones.

Site Reliability Engineer - Ensure 99.99% uptime for our customer-facing services. Build observability tooling, automate incident response, and drive reliability improvements. On-call rotation required.
